channel.title: The AI Sales Leader: Insights
channel.description: Straight answers on sales leadership, revenue growth, and AI-powered sales teams, from Greg Grand.

item.title: CASL: The Definitive AI Sales Leadership Certification
item.description: Master AI for sales leadership. Get certified with CASL, the industry's premier AI sales leadership certification. Learn to build high-performing AI-driven sales teams now.

item.title: How to Roll Out AI to a Sales Team: System First, Tools Second
item.description: Learn how to roll out AI to a sales team effectively. Focus on defining your sales system and specific problems before choosing any AI tools. Greg Grand explains.

item.title: How to Use AI to Prepare for a Discovery Call in 15 Minutes
item.description: Learn how to use AI to prepare for a discovery call in under 15 minutes. Greg Grand shares a direct, actionable framework for sales leaders and founders.

item.title: How to Use AI for Sales Prospecting Research: Smarter Hunting
item.description: Learn how to effectively use AI for sales prospecting research. This guide provides a direct process for identifying valuable insights and personalizing outreach, helping you hunt smarter.
